title: leucostele litoralis
intro: Leucostele litoralis, also known as the coastal prickly pear or silver tree cactus, is a species of plant in the family Cactaceae. It is known for its edible fruits, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Leucostele litoralis can be prepared as a tea, juice, or syrup for consumption, and its fruits and flowers can also be eaten raw or used in jams and preserves.
